{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = 'Bots
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mell]] has 'Bots stashed around to assist in investigations.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’ve got ‘Bots stashed all around. If we can get connected, I can use them to brute force the investigation.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
